title: An Adventure in Time and Space
description: The official modpack for the AITAS server!
body:
The official **Adventure in Time and Space** server modpack! 

 

Roleplay as the Doctor, fight in the Last Great Time War, run from Daleks, build civilisations. Be who you want, when you want, however you want.

This modpack adds a whole host of intergalactic technology and a range of time travel options allowing you to move through history in an instant. Bend time to your will or observe the birth and death of worlds in a single second.

 
All of time and space. Where do you want to go? What do you want to see?

Server IP: adventureintimeandspace.net

Any questions? Ask us on [discord](https://discord.gg/FBRx7nFzDS).


![River Song](https://media.giphy.com/media/616v5bU8g8dTW/giphy.gif)

Please note although this pack is based on the BBC TV Series Doctor Who, we are by no way affiliated with the BBC, Whoniverse IP or Bad Wolf studios and they hold all rights respectively.
